entries.description: (In Chambers) Order by Judge Stanley Blumenfeld, Jr.: The Court vacates the June 5 mandatory scheduling conference and hearing on Defendants' motion to transfer (Dkt. No. 37). THERE IS NO PDF DOCUMENT ASSOCIATED WITH THIS ENTRY. (lfa) TEXT ONLY ENTRY (Entered: 06/03/2026)

ORDER GRANTING MOTION TO TRANSFER VENUE [DKT. NO. 37 ] by Judge Stanley Blumenfeld, Jr. The motion is therefore granted, and this action is transferred to the United States District Court for the Southern District of New York. (SEE DOCUMENT FOR FURTHER DETAILS) (chk) (Entered: 06/03/2026)

REPLY in Support of NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION to Transfer Case to Southern District of New York 37 filed by Defendants Kalshi Inc., Kalshi Klear Inc., Kalshi Klear LLC, Kalshi Trading LLC, KalshiEX LLC. (Porter, Andrew) (Entered: 05/22/2026)

MEMORANDUM of Points and Authorities in Opposition filed by Defendants Kalshi Inc., Kalshi Klear Inc., Kalshi Klear LLC, Kalshi Trading LLC, KalshiEX LLC. Re: Request for Judicial Notice, 42 (Porter, Andrew) (Entered: 05/22/2026)

OPPOSITION re: NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION to Transfer Case to Southern District of New York 37 filed by Plaintiffs Yonatan Gliksman, Adam Risch. (Attachments: # 1 Declaration of Adam Risch, # 2 Declaration of Yonatan Gliksman)(Fisher, Cody) (Entered: 05/15/2026)

REQUEST FOR JUDICIAL NOTICE re NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION to Transfer Case to Southern District of New York 37 (in support of opposition thereto) filed by Plaintiffs Yonatan Gliksman, Adam Risch. (Attachments: # 1 Exhibit A December 2025 FCMS, # 2 Exhibit B Golan docket sheet, # 3 Exhibit Exhibit C Golan complaint, # 4 Proposed Order)(Fisher, Cody) (Entered: 05/15/2026)

(Minutes of) Mandatory Scheduling Conference (Held and completed) held before Judge Stanley Blumenfeld, Jr. The Court heard from the parties about the contents of their joint Rule 26(f) report. For the reasons stated on the record, the Court continues the MSC to June 5, 2026, at 8:30 a.m. Court Recorder: CourtSmart. (san) (Entered: 05/11/2026)

(In Chambers) Order by Judge Stanley Blumenfeld, Jr.: Defendants' motion to transfer does not comply with Local Rule 7-3, which requires that "counsel for the moving party must include a declaration, under penalty of perjury, that sets forth at a minimum the date(s) the conference took place and the position of each party with respect to each disputed issue that will be the subject of the motion" and cautions that "[f]ailure to include such a declaration may result in the motion being denied." By May 8, 2026, Defendants shall file a declaration that fully complies with L.R. 7-3, addressing both sides' positions on every disputed issue with sufficient detail to demonstrate that they meaningfully met and conferred and to enable the Court to understand the substance of the parties' positions. Failure to timely file a compliant declaration will result in the motion being summarily denied. THERE IS NO PDF DOCUMENT ASSOCIATED WITH THIS ENTRY. (sod) TEXT ONLY ENTRY (Entered: 05/07/2026)

DECLARATION of Samir L. Vora in Support of NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION to Transfer Case to Southern District of New York 37 filed by Defendants Kalshi Inc., Kalshi Klear Inc., Kalshi Klear LLC, Kalshi Trading LLC, KalshiEX LLC. (Attachments: # 1 Exhibit B - 2026.04.10 Letter from S. Vora to M. Novian)(Vora, Samir) (Entered: 05/07/2026)

NOTICE of Change of Lead Counsel changing lead counsel from Samir L. Vora to Andrew L. Porter. filed by Defendants Kalshi Inc., Kalshi Klear Inc., Kalshi Klear LLC, Kalshi Trading LLC, KalshiEX LLC, (Vora, Samir) (Entered: 05/06/2026)

NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION to Transfer Case to Southern District of New York filed by Defendants Kalshi Inc., Kalshi Klear Inc., Kalshi Klear LLC, Kalshi Trading LLC, KalshiEX LLC. Motion set for hearing on 6/5/2026 at 08:30 AM before Judge Stanley Blumenfeld Jr.. (Attachments: # 1 Declaration of Richard Heaslip in Support, # 2 Exhibit A - Golan Complaint, # 3 Proposed Order) (Vora, Samir) (Entered: 05/06/2026)

(In Chambers) Order by Judge Stanley Blumenfeld, Jr.: The parties' stipulated requests to stay Defendants' response deadline and for an extended briefing schedule on the contemplated motions is denied. However, the Court will extend Defendants' deadlines to file the motion to dismiss and motion to compel arbitration so that it may first resolve the motion to transfer. Accordingly, Defendants shall file the motion to transfer by May 6, 2026, set for hearing on June 5. Defendants shall file the motion to dismiss and motion to compel arbitration by June 19, 2026. The parties shall comply with the briefing deadlines in the local rules. THERE IS NO PDF DOCUMENT ASSOCIATED WITH THIS ENTRY. (lfa) TEXT ONLY ENTRY (Entered: 05/04/2026)

Joint STIPULATION for Order to Set Briefing Schedule for Kalshi Defendants' Anticipated Motions filed by Defendant Kalshi Inc., Kalshi Klear Inc., Kalshi Klear LLC, Kalshi Trading LLC, KalshiEX LLC. (Attachments: # 1 Proposed Order)(Vora, Samir) (Entered: 04/29/2026)
JOINT REPORT Rule 26(f) Discovery Plan ; estimated length of trial 10-15 court days, filed by Plaintiffs Yonatan Gliksman, Adam Risch.. (Novian, Matthew) (Entered: 04/28/2026)
